title: Příkaz mini uninstall
goal: Add a visible mini uninstall command that removes the /mini:* slash commands (user-scope ~/.claude/commands/mini and, when present, project-scope .claude/commands/mini) and strips only mini's own statusLine block from ~/.claude/settings.json (recognized by the mini statusline command, leaving a foreign one intact), with --dry-run and a confirmation prompt.

steps.title: Recognize + remove mini statusLine
steps.detail: In statuslineSettings.ts add isMiniStatusline(command) (matches mini's .../cli.js statusline, not a foreign one like my-own-statusline), a pure removeStatusline(settings) and an IO removeStatuslineFromSettings({home, dryRun}) that strips only mini's statusLine, preserves other keys, leaves a foreign/absent one untouched. Unit tests.

steps.title: uninstall() command logic
steps.detail: New src/commands/uninstall.ts: removes user-scope ~/.claude/commands/mini and project-scope .claude/commands/mini when present, calls removeStatuslineFromSettings; --dry-run reports without writing; confirmation prompt (skipped by --yes; without a TTY and without --yes it aborts with a hint). Prints a summary of what was removed.

steps.title: Wire visible mini uninstall into CLI
steps.detail: Add a visible command in cli.ts with --dry-run and --yes, delegating to uninstall().

steps.title: Tests for uninstall
steps.detail: Both scopes removed when present, mini statusLine stripped, foreign statusLine kept, --dry-run writes nothing, nothing-to-do path.

steps.title: Verify: typecheck + full tests
steps.detail: npm run typecheck and npm test green.
